subject: A sweeping pastoral river vista — a wide river winds between rolling green hills and small islands, stretching toward a bright horizon under sunbeams breaking through scattered clouds.
description: A wide-angle landscape painting. A broad, calm river snakes through a chain of low green hills and islands, leading the eye into the distance toward a luminous horizon. The sky dominates the upper half of the frame: bright blue with scattered cumulus clouds and visible god-rays of sunlight breaking through, reflecting on the water's surface. Tree-covered hills flank the river on both sides, deep emerald and forest greens fading into hazier blue-greens in the distance. No figures, no structures, no creatures visible — the composition is pure landscape, peaceful and expansive.
foreground: river surface and the nearest green, tree-covered hill banks
background: receding chain of hills and islands fading into a bright, sunlit horizon under a clouded sky
emotion: serene, expansive, tranquil — a vista that invites contemplation
